title: Fix null dereference in parser
prompt: A TypeScript parser crashes when `token` is null at `token.value.trim()`. Explain root cause and propose a safe fix.

title: Find race condition in file cache
prompt: Concurrent requests mutate a shared in-memory cache and return stale data. Describe how to debug and fix this race.

title: Refactor command handler
prompt: A 250-line command handler mixes parsing, validation, and side effects. Provide a refactoring plan.

title: Remove duplicated validation
prompt: Three services duplicate input validation logic. Suggest a safer shared design.

title: Add --json output mode
prompt: Design implementation steps to add a `--json` flag to an existing CLI that currently prints text only.

title: Add batch benchmark execution
prompt: Propose a feature to execute benchmark scenarios in batches with per-scenario timeout and aggregated metrics.

title: Code review: leaked token
prompt: During review, you spot an API token committed in source code. Provide review feedback and remediation actions.

title: Code review: unsafe SQL query
prompt: Review this pattern: `SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '" + input + "'` and propose a safe alternative.
